title: Volormon
description: A modpack to play cobblemon on that includes a community server in multiplayer listing.
body:
![Person running around with pokemon and a pokecenter.](https://i.imgur.com/p2OYJlK_d.webp?maxwidth=760&fidelity=grand)
Volormon pack is the offical modpack for the Voloron Network, a group of gamers and pokemon/minecraft enthusiest!


Taking pokemon and minecraft and merging them in a way never seen before using the cobblemon mod! This mod unlike others that already exist makes pokemon look like they actually exist in the world of minecraft! We offer some unique features to our modpack that others don't to enhance the players experience and making playing the game much easier without having to change settings or mod versions etc.
Discord: [https://discord.gg/66jqNJdJkD](https://discord.gg/66jqNJdJkD)


To get 15% off your first month use our code for server hosting! Just click the link below!
![Kinetic hosting 15% off using code voloron](https://i.imgur.com/NLx1EJe.png)
[https://billing.kinetichosting.net/aff.php?aff=705](https://billing.kinetichosting.net/aff.php?aff=705)
